name: @flipagent/extension
description: flipagent Chrome extension — local executor for the bridge surfaces (`/v1/purchases`, `/v1/forwarder/*`, `/v1/browser/*`). Polls the hosted bridge protocol and runs jobs inside the user's existing Chrome — their cookies, their marketplace logins. The extension is a stateless observer, not an auto-clicker.

scripts.zip: npm run build && node -e "const{readFileSync}=require('fs');const{execSync}=require('child_process');const v=JSON.parse(readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')).version;execSync('cd dist && zip -qr ../flipagent-'+v+'.zip .',{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('[extension] zipped → flipagent-'+v+'.zip')"
